result.finding: Single docker-compose.yml defining 2 services: 'oracle-db' (Oracle Database Free 23ai) and 'photoalbum-java-app' (Spring Boot application). Services communicate over a custom bridge network. No Kubernetes manifests or Helm charts present.
evidence: docker-compose.yml at project root — 1 file, 2 services
Service 1: oracle-db — image: gvenzl/oracle-free:latest, port 1521, named volume oracle_data, healthcheck configured, init scripts bind-mounted
Service 2: photoalbum-java-app — built from Dockerfile, port 8080:8080, depends_on oracle-db (service_healthy), restart: on-failure
No k8s/, helm/, or manifests/ directories found
values: No Kubernetes resources, no Helm charts
